programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Disgruntled to learn his favourite table at Cafe Nervosa has been commandeered by a rude fellow customer, Frasier resorts to physical violence to reclaim it - but later regrets losing his temper

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins' new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boy's father. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset to learn Penny is dating someone, so his friends encourage him to seek a new romance by asking another woman out. Sara Gilbert appears alongside her Roseanne co-star Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is fired for being disrespectful to his boss, and explores new activities in a bid to find a purpose in life other than physics, but Leonard takes drastic action to restore him to his old self. Laurie Metcalf guest stars as Sheldon's mother

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard fears he is wasting his time with Penny and ends up spending the night with fellow scientist Leslie. However, he is disappointed when she later tells him she was only interested in a one-night stand. Meanwhile, Sheldon frets over a change to his hamburger routine. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders embarks on a whirlwind romance with Mrs Krabappel after he saves the schoolteacher's life when she tried to escape a detention room at Springfield Elementary. However, things start to unravel when she reveals how many men she has slept with - a list that includes Homer and Aerosmith drummer Joey Krammer

programme.title: World Chase Tag - USA
programme.desc: Highlights from Atlanta, Georgia, as 16 teams from around America competed for the title in a knockout version of the playground game

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Ship Inn in Dymchurch, Kent, where James Tindall and Jessica Walton hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Jacobs Plough in Bicester, Oxfordshire, run by manager Duncan Froomes and bar supervisor Ryan Hunt who like to mix banter with business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and settle some scores. The Ship Inn is up first, with managers James Tindall and Jessica Walton wanting to let off steam about the surprise comments that made their visit a heated affair

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers
programme.desc: Lancashire baker Molly is asked to bake a cake replica of a very special carp - the prize catch of angler Andrew, as a surprise for his 50th birthday

programme.title: Heston's Feasts
programme.desc: Inspired by his teenage years, Heston Blumenthal creates a meal dedicated to showing off the excesses of the 1980s. He begins by providing comedian Johnny Vegas, impressionist Jon Culshaw, singer Jamelia and columnist Caitlin Moran with a yuppie-themed starter of sake champagne served inside a giant mobile phone. Moving on, he serves up microwaved lobster, and concludes by combining ice-cream with tiramisu to create a unique dessert

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: A young couple ask George to help make sense of their poorly planned Victorian terrace, which currently means they have to go through the kitchen to get to the only bathroom in the house. They have big ideas, but without a budget to match it will prove to be a challenge. The architect also visits a mother in the Cotswolds who plans to knock together two tiny Grade II listed cottages to create a cosy family home. This will leave her with two kitchens, two sitting rooms and even two staircases. Can George come up with a plan to make the most of this arrangement?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Jungle Mystery: Lost Kingdoms of the Amazon
programme.desc: Ella al-Shamahi searches for the remains of ancient civilisations in the Amazon rainforest, beginning with the discovery of mysterious geometric shapes revealed by deforestation in Brazil. Ella also joins an indigenous community for whom this past is essential to establishing their land rights today and helps them prove once and for all that this land has been theirs for centuries

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts is in Glasgow to investigate the impact of steam power on Britain's major towns in the 18th and 19th centuries. She also learns about the arrival of migrant workers in the city and how the insanitary conditions in which they lived, which made Glasgow both a hotbed of disease and a place of great medical advancement. Aerial archaeologist Ben Robinson flies his drone over Loch Katrine as he tells the story of how Victorian engineers overcame geographical barriers to bring fresh drinking water to the workers of Glasgow

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage of the most extreme weather conditions in the UK over the past year, from the worst floods in a decade and a freak landslide in Fife, to an account of being in a house when it is struck by lightning. The programme also explains the scientific reasons behind the wildfire that destroyed one of the UK's most precious nature reserves, as well as a look back at record-breaking days of both heat and rain

programme.title: Formula 1

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Black rhino Kitani is due to give birth at Chester Zoo and help swell the ranks of this endangered species, but, having lost three previous calves, it is a worrying time and the keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan. The zoo also has four rare new arrivals called tenrecs, mysterious mammals from Madagascar and, with so little known about them, the keepers try everything they can to help them breed, while red river hog Mali has given birth to twins, but tearaway dad Confetti is a threat to his own babies

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris arrives in Mombasa to follow what was surely the greatest railway endeavour of the entire colonial era - the so-called Lunatic Line. programme.title: The Dambusters: Attack! Attack! Attack!
programme.desc: The documentary concludes with the story of the raid on Germany's dams, which got off to a rocky start as two of the Lancaster bombers were forced to return home damaged, while a third was destroyed by enemy fire. As the crews made their way across Europe, more planes were lost and the first attempts to destroy the dams failed. But then 21-year-old pilot David Maltby and his crew released their bomb and breached the dam with devastating effect. After this point, the targets were destroyed - but at a shocking cost. Presented by Dan Snow

programme.title: Critical Condition
programme.desc: The work of medical staff at Stoke's Royal University Hospital. Stephen has just suffered a potentially lethal stroke, and staff whisk him straight into theatre to undergo a cutting-edge operation to have a blood clot removed. programme.title: Lesbian Virgin Diaries

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Rob Bell follows the Callander and Oban Railway, an epic 70-mile route from Scotland's Lowlands to its glorious west coast. Setting off from Callander, he recalls the 14 years of determination it took to build this railway and how, with the help of local hero Rob Roy, it changed Victorian perceptions of the Highlands. No longer a distant land of fearsome Clans, the mountains, lochs and valleys were now a romantic and accessible destination of choice. Spectacles on the line include Glen Ogle, Loch Tay and an impressive terminus still evident at Oban

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: The maid of honour at a pending wedding has little faith in a supposedly charmed cottage which makes people fall in love, until she meets the groom's brother. Romantic comedy, starring Merritt Patterson, Steve Lund and Brittney Wilson

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: A look back at the best bits, the never-seen-before out-takes and bizarre moments from the past four series of Cruising with Jane McDonald. Plus, a version of the festive classic The 12 Days of Christmas is sung by carollers from Jane's home town of Wakefield

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: Cameras follow 24 hours of life on the factory floor at the McVitie's factory in Carlisle, documenting the work of the staff making some of the nation's favourite biscuits. The programme follows the whole production line process, from mixing the dough and baking the biscuits, to the engineering teams keeping the machines running, and staff offer first-hand accounts of life working in the oldest biscuit factory in the world. Plus, Food historian Dr Polly Russell reveals the history of the factory

programme.title: Sandringham: The Royals at Christmas
programme.desc: Documentary charting every detail of the royal family's Christmas celebrations at Sandringham. Run with military precision and steeped in tradition, the film examines what Prince Harry's then-fiancee Meghan Markle has in store as she attends for the first time and the etiquette to which she must adhere. Plus, a look at the rich history of the royal family Christmas, going back to Victorian times. Contributors include royal insiders and cultural historians

programme.title: Jane McDonald Sings the 80s
programme.desc: Jane hosts a 1980s-themed party, with Carol Decker, Gary Wilmot and Hue and Cry joining her on the show. There are sing-along hits, laughs, tears, huge surprises and massive prize giveaways as the diva of the north celebrates Britain's unsung heroes

programme.title: The Story of the Songs
programme.desc: Documentary examining the personal and musical development of the singer and actress by investigating the stories behind three of her greatest songs

programme.desc: Documentary meeting some of the characters and hearing the stories that make the gambling capital of Las Vegas one of the most fun-filled cities on Earth

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres is forced to rely on old case notes and contacts after a US Marine's murder is linked to a former dirt bike gang he once joined for a year-long undercover sting operation. Wilmer Valderrama stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The stress of McGee and Delilah's imminent wedding takes its toll, as the would-be bride is rushed to hospital. Meanwhile, the NCIS team travels out to sea after an apparently healthy petty officer aboard a Navy destroyer dies mysteriously in his sleep

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, McGee and Torres travel to a remote area of Paraguay, controlled by a violent group of rebels, in an attempt to locate a missing Navy Seal who disappeared during an unsanctioned trip

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Rob Bell considers London's Tower Bridge, which was built to a revolutionary design and in the Second World War became a target for German V-1 flying bombs

programme.title: Moonrise (1948)
programme.desc: A man is haunted by the fact that his late father was a murderer, something no-one will ever let him forget. His problems are further compounded when he accidentally kills a man in self-defence - and realising people will think it was malicious, he decides to hide the body. Drama, starring Dane Clark, Gail Russell and Ethel Barrymore

programme.title: Elephant Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to come to terms with her tea plantation owner husband's obsession with his dead father. Melodrama, starring Elizabeth Taylor, Peter Finch, Dana Andrews and Abraham Sofaer

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)
programme.desc: A general charged with the defence of New Orleans in 1812 learns the British are sending a vast fleet to retake the city. His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneer's loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMille's classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat (1957)
programme.desc: A lieutenant deserts after his commanding officer launches an unprovoked attack on a Comanche village during the Civil War. Realising that there are no soldiers in his home town to protect it from reprisals, he returns to train the local women to defend themselves. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Kathryn Grant, Hope Emerson and Jeff Donnell

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Die Hard 4.0 (2007)
programme.desc: Tough New York cop John McClane is sent to escort a computer hacker to Washington for questioning. During this routine operation he stumbles on a criminal mastermind's plan to launch a technological terrorist attack on the US, and is forced to enlist the hacker's aid in foiling the evil scheme. Action thriller sequel, with Bruce Willis, Timothy Olyphant, Justin Long and Maggie Q

programme.title: Wild Honey Pie! (2018)
programme.desc: Gillian, an aspiring writer and her DJ husband Oliver attempt to recover when their marriage hits perhaps the first pothole before the proverbial rut. But then interest in Gillian's first play kicks off a series of encounters that could provide all the spice and complexity any marriage could want. Writer/director Jamie Adams' comedy drama, starring Jemima Kirke, Richard Elis and Sarah Solemani

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin (1966)
programme.desc: Former crook and disreputable spy Harry Palmer has to carefully engineer the defection of a Russian officer responsible for safeguarding vital military secrets - but the mission proves less than straightforward. Cold War thriller and the second film to feature Len Deighton's character, starring Michael Caine, Eva Renzi, Oscar Homolka, Paul Hubschmid and Guy Doleman

programme.title: Bridge of Spies (2015)
programme.desc: A lawyer in 1950s New York is hired to represent a Soviet spy in a showcase trial designed to demonstrate the fairness of the US justice system. In the face of public condemnation, he argues against the death penalty, a stance that years later leads to his involvement in an exchange of prisoners in East Germany. Steven Spielberg's fact-based Cold War drama, starring Tom Hanks and an Oscar-winning Mark Rylance

programme.title: Den of Thieves (2018)
programme.desc: An elite unit of the Los Angeles county sheriffs' department investigates a series of perfectly executed heists, and uncovers a criminal gang composed of military veterans, whose strategic and combat experience make them an elusive foe. The investigators set out to bring them to justice before they can carry out their biggest robbery yet - stealing £120million from the Federal Reserve Bank. Director Christian Gudegast's crime drama, starring Gerard Butler and Jordan Bridges

programme.title: Sleepless (2017)
programme.desc: Las Vegas cop Vincent Downs steals a 25kg shipment of cocaine from a violent casino boss, whose associates kidnap Downs' teenage son in retaliation. Downs is keen to return the drugs and see his son set free, but is hampered by having to dodge the attentions of an internal affairs officer. Action thriller, starring Jamie Foxx, Dermot Mulroney and Michelle Monaghan

programme.title: Riddick (2013)
programme.desc: A fugitive is left for dead by his treacherous followers on a dangerous world full of lethal predators. He lures bounty hunters to the planet in the hope of killing them and stealing their spacecraft, but finds himself forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters at the top of the food chain. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel and Katee Sackhoff

programme.title: Faintheart (2008)
programme.desc: Family man Richard finds solace from his humdrum life in the world of historical battle re-enactments. However, when his hobby sees him spend more time on the battlefield than at home, his wife leaves him for a gym instructor, forcing Richard to reassess his priorities. Romantic comedy, starring Eddie Marsan, Ewen Bremner, Jessica Hynes, Bronagh Gallagher, Tim Healy and Paul Nicholls

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen is brought to a secretive underground society following the destruction of the televised deathmatch. She becomes the figurehead of a revolution against the despotic Panem regime, while her friend Peeta remains a captive of its tyrannical president. Part one of the two-part conclusion to the sci-fi adventure series, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Julianne Moore and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles (1987)
programme.desc: A stressed businessman just wants to make it home to spend Thanksgiving with his family. However, when his flight is forced to land miles from its destination, he finds himself sharing a disaster-strewn journey across America with an amiable but slobbish salesman. Comedy road movie, starring Steve Martin, John Candy, Laila Robins, Kevin Bacon and Michael McKean

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Kill List (2011)
programme.desc: A hitman with money worries is persuaded by his old partner to take on one last job. The duo's mysterious client presents them with a list of three targets, but as they go about their deadly work, they start to realise there is something far more disturbing going on than a simple act of murder. Thriller, with Neil Maskell, Michael Smiley and MyAnna Buring

His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Raj's best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret

programme.desc: Part one of two. A rogue lawyer persuades JD to perform a risky operation on her father. Turk tries to avoid a hypochondriac patient, and Elliot offers Doug career advice. Guest starring Julianna Margulies (ER, The Good Wife)

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Part two of two. JD decides to call it a day with Neena, but ends up needing Jordan to fight his battles for him. Meanwhile, Elliot tries to assert her independence - a prospect that leaves Dr Cox terrified. Guest starring Julianna Margulies (ER, The Good Wife)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox needs Mel's permission after she is asked about becoming a model, and Mel is not keen until she finds out about the money that could be made. Meanwhile, Ryder has problems approaching a new girl and Joe tries to give him advice. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox and Ryder work on a documentary project together. Meanwhile, Mel plans a lesbian wedding for her cousin on a limited budget, but one of the brides-to-be gets distracted. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to make a deal with a suspect Diaz has just arrested in an attempt to catch a car thief he has been tracking for years. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: With his parents recently divorced, privately educated Will has to move to a new area and make friends at the local comprehensive, where he meets Simon, Jay and Neil. First episode of the comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neil's father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides contestants through the game of choosing a partner naked, as they must whittle six contenders down to one with whom to share a date. Here, sick of the party lifestyle, 27-year-old former club rep Chris, from London, hopes to meet someone to settle down with. Next up is 27-year-old technophobe Louise, from Buckinghamshire, who hasn't so far embraced the modern way of dating. A fan of classic romantic novels, Louise is looking for an old fashioned gentleman to sweep her off her feet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Animated US sitcom set in the world of Rick, a genius inventor and his less-than-genius grandson Morty. In the first episode, missing for nearly 20 years, drunken scientist Rick arrives on his daughter Beth's doorstep looking to move in, but her husband Jerry isn't too thrilled. Rick converts the garage into his laboratory and involves easily influenced grandson Morty in his insane misadventures, starting with a mission to another dimension to find the seeds to mega-trees

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Part one of two. Her father Mickey also shows up to offer comfort, but she worries Marshall may not make it to witness the birth of his son

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel needs to prove that all of her employees are American citizens, but runs into problems because of Joe's divorce hearing. Meanwhile, Lennox decides to go to a school dance with one of her female friends. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes, but after talking to Pops he becomes determined to cure himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby DeVante hates him, so he enlists Andre Jr and Diane's help to win over his little brother

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow struggles to adjust when she returns to work at the end of her maternity leave and faces the combined challenges of domestic and professional life. Meanwhile, Ruby gives the twins a 'workaround' plan to get out of doing their homework

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD helps his favourite patient track down a missing relative so he can get an urgent kidney transplant, while Elliot determines to be taken seriously as a doctor. Guest starring Matthew Perry (Friends) and his real-life father John Bennett Perry

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD is asked to discuss the realities of being a doctor with a group of medical students, but ends up strolling down memory lane instead. Meanwhile, Elliot's dislike of children crumbles when she meets a 10-year-old whose father is being operated on. Medical comedy, starring Zach Braff

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The school charity auction takes place and Mel urges Joe to participate, but when he does it seems as though the winner has ulterior motives for volunteering. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel feels the pressure to be in a relationship when her last single friend gets engaged, and decides to go on a date with a man who is dull - but Joe teases her about finding someone more interesting. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gina's flat

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Mel and Maggie are frightened that Jordan's curse is still active, and Harry and Macy decide to be more open about their feelings. Melonie Diaz, Sarah Jeffery, Madeleine Mantock and Rupert Evans star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode of the soap from 2005. As Jack gets ready to marry Frankie, Becca and Jake also prepare to tie the knot. However, Becca is having doubts, especially when her student, Justin Burton tells her he loves her

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alice Levine, Asim Chaudhry, Liza Tarbuck, Russell Howard and Tim Vine perform wheelbarrow stunts, build with fruit and emerge from wardrobes, as they compete for the ultimate prize - Taskmaster Greg Davies's disembodied head dipped in gold. As always, Alex Horne is on hand to assist with quiet dignity

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jeffords becomes anxious about his upcoming lieutenant's exam, Peralta, Captain Holt and the squad decide to distract him from the stress by holding the precinct's annual Halloween Heist on a new date, Cinco de Mayo

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: It's Not Rocket Science, the BBC's news report on the gender pay gap, The Secret Life of the Zoo, Happy Valley, The Real Marigold Hotel, The Supervet, ITV's news report on east versus west and First Dates come under scrutiny as the armchair critics share their views. First broadcast in February 2016

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alice Levine, Asim Chaudhry, Liza Tarbuck, Russell Howard and Tim Vine perform wheelbarrow stunts, build with fruit and emerge from wardrobes, as they compete for the ultimate prize - Taskmaster Greg Davies's disembodied head dipped in gold. As always, Alex Horne is on hand to assist with quiet dignity

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Cordelia's birthday brings more than just presents as she is catapulted onto the astral plane, where she learns her increasingly agonising visions will eventually kill her - unless she travels back in time to change history. Supernatural adventure, starring David Boreanaz and Charisma Carpenter

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds a potential buyer for the town, while David and Alexis realise they have become attached to Schitt's Creek

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to persuade Quinn to leave her job as a stripper, while Ted gets into online dating to overcome his feelings for Robin, but after failing to find a partner sets out to heal his relationship with her. Elsewhere, Lily is driven to the edge by Marshall's pre-natal preparations and decides to send him away on a guys-only weekend

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Part one of two. Marshall and Barney try desperately to get back to the hospital before Lily gives birth, while Ted and Robin attempt to distract her from the painful contractions by telling funny stories. Her father Mickey also shows up to offer comfort, but she worries Marshall may not make it to witness the birth of his son

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring ducks going up an escalator, animal impressions, narrow escapes on a snowboard and an energy drink house prank

programme.title: Christmas Encore (2017)
programme.desc: A struggling actress falls in love with her director during a production of A Christmas Carol. Romantic drama, starring Maggie Lawson and Brennan Elliott

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps the Davises, with mum Kristi is overwhelmed and frustrated at having to discipline her three girls while her husband Diarmid timidly passes the buck.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Calvin plans an over-the-top Scottish wedding at Loch Ness, but his bride-to-be Leanne has always dreamed of a simple affair

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Reece, who is ex-military, plans an army-themed wedding with a twist. However, his fiancee Lucy has dreams of getting married in a castle. It therefore remains to be seen whether he will win her over with his military manoeuvres - or instead receive his marching orders

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Tensions are still running high in Cornwall and Tristan decides to leave, while Sam and Zara meet for the first time since breaking up and have a tough and emotional conversation

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Best Bits
programme.desc: The first of two highlights programmes celebrating 10 years of the culinary contest. Featuring some of the most unusual, confusing and innuendo-laden cakes to grace the tent. The programme also revisits some of the most popular contestants from past series, including Norman, Flo and Kim-Joy

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A scary TV movie motivates Barry to beg his father to build an underground bunker for the family, but Murray isn't easily persuaded. Erica and Adam go over the top with lavish Mother's Day gifts for Beverly before bringing important requests to her. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the academic year comes to a close, Barry and Erica wonder how they will appear in the school yearbook and pressure Adam, who is on the team producing it, to see the rough layout before it goes to print. Murray is annoyed when Marvin pays a visit to ask for money. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica cannot wait to get out of the house as Graduation Day approaches - until it dawns on her how much her mother's affection means to her. Barry's plans for a summer with Lainey turn to dust, while Dana makes an unexpected visit. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray help Erica move into her college dormitory, where her room-mate is also named Erica, but Beverly has a hard time saying goodbye to her daughter. Now that Lainey has gone to college, Adam tries to find the perfect girlfriend for Barry, even pretending to build one, as in the film Weird Science

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Raj's help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The gang goes on the infamous sociology and geography field trip to Swanage, during which Neil tries his hardest to avoid the advances of over-friendly teacher Mr Kennedy. Meanwhile, Will takes a shine to new girl Lauren - but she is only interested in Simon. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is unhappy about being forced by Mr Gilbert to take a work experience job at a garage due to a mix-up that sees Neil joining a newspaper. Meanwhile, Jay sorts out a placement for himself and Simon at his father's plant hire company. Starring Simon Bird and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will tries to reinvent the boys' image by taking them clubbing around London, but Simon is unsure whether to go until Carli shows an interest in the outing. When the friends arrive in the West End, their efforts to appear cool are hampered by aggressive bouncers, a tramp and some angry bus passengers

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber To (2014)
programme.desc: Dim-witted friends Harry and Lloyd are reunited after 20 years. When Harry discovers he has a daughter he never knew about, he breaks his friend out of a psychiatric hospital and they go on a road trip with the intention of fulfilling parental responsibilities neither of them is capable of. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies presents another assortment of absurd assignments, as Alex Horne tries to ignore Richard Herring hiding menacingly in a bush, Katherine Parkinson pays a visit to the fridge, Mawaan Rizwan steals a cup of tea and Johnny Vegas takes a tumble

programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: Security guard John from Wexford is on his first date in eight years. He is looking for someone with plenty of personality, and meets chatty Vikki from Laois

programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: Budding actor Danny from Sligo has been waiting a long time for his leading lady, and tries to impress film student Caoileann from Dublin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Calvin plans an over-the-top Scottish wedding at Loch Ness, but his bride-to-be Leanne has always dreamed of a simple affair

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Chris and Sherrine Kingsley-Smith have spent most of their 14-year marriage travelling the world on a boat but are now ready to drop anchor for dry land. Chris is keen on the rural lifestyle of the Cotswolds, where they have friends, but Sherrine has her heart set on the Dordogne region of France, where they're currently renting. Jonnie Irwin shows them places in the UK for their budget of £700,000, while Jasmine Harman tempts them with some amazing properties in France for up to £900,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is in Hay-on-Wye and Bedford, where Henry restores a bespoke workbench, and Simon ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge helps Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca find their feet after leaving the UK to start a new life in a dilapidated 25-room chateau that has no plumbing

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: A Cambridgeshire couple plan to build a four-bedroom detached house for the cost of a tiny terrace - which requires working round the clock and calling in a lot of favours

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tim and Jules Anderson are first to host at the King's Head and Queen's Jules in Suffolk, where they provide their guests with a lesson in how to fillet fish, and an evening of karaoke. However, the owners find criticism hard to take the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Blossom welcome their rivals to the Hotel Continental in Harwich, Essex, where they are greeted by an erotic art display. The guests enjoy participating in a poetry reading during the afternoon, each writing their own piece, but the morning's breakfast goes awry after the hosts have a disagreement

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ryan Davies has to deal with a crisis when the contestants stay his five-star B&B Llanerch Vineyard in south Wales, but still manages to impress with his location and selection of wines. However, Gordon and Blossom go on a fault-finding mission and leave feedback the host is not happy with

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Tracy Bullows, owners of the Whitehall Hotel in Darwen, Lancashire, play host to the last night of the week's competition. Hoping to impress with a mix of professionalism and efficiency, they decide to take their guests on a tour of a local paint factory, but tempers fray and a stony silence follows at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Giant otter couple Diego and Icana are the best of friends but have never mated, so keepers hope a new male will have what it takes to relight Icana's fire. Blue morpho butterflies Macuna and Peanut also need to mate, but when their diet of fruit ferments and turns to alcohol, their drunken behaviour might dash Chester's hopes of producing the next generation of butterflies. Cameras also follow the relationship between mum-and-daughter Andrean bears Lima and Madidi, who are fighting over food and personal space. Can the youngster learn to respect her elder?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Angel as they host a very special wedding for close friends. Motorcycle-mad Essex couple Martin and Kim start their search to buy the perfect chateau but can't see eye to eye. Cash-strapped Tim and Rebecca call in their mates to help with restoration work. Fiona puts her B&B plans on hold as she races against time to prepare for her first wedding. With the reception set to be outside she needs to fix 40 windows on the ageing chateau facade

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: A mother-of-six plans to re-create a beloved historic villa from her childhood in Northern Auckland, but her husband would prefer a more modern dwelling

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: After a four year stint living in New Zealand, ex-RAF pilot Jon and GP Gill Flewers want to build a Kiwi-style hill house on the slopes of the Malvern hills in Worcestershire. They plan to build an ambitious three-storey home clad in wood and stone, but the pair encounter problems as the site is so steep builders do not want to take on the job

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a Victorian villa in Leeds, West Yorkshire, where Jawad and Charlie are planning a master en-suite which, if the rest of their quirky renovations are anything to go by, looks set to be a mammoth task. He also helps Jason and Hannah in Brixton, south London, who are tackling an ambitious two-storey extension. The big question is - should they lose their redundant chimney breast and increase the size of the room?

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on Wiltshire's police, paramedics and fire services. Cases include a man with an axe-related injury, while another team respond to a Saturday afternoon call-out to help the victim of an injury incurred while playing rugby. And at a road traffic incident, a woman has to be cut out of her car and faces life-changing multiple injuries

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The documentary following patients being treated at St George's in south-west London reaches its 200th edition. Ky, 18, is brought in after being knocked off her motorbike in a hit-and-run, and her mum Sam is by her side as doctors assess the damage to her legs and pelvis. Aleks, 41, is suffering from confusion and memory loss after falling from her loft onto her head, and as her husband Paulo arrives at the hospital, medical staff are still unsure as to whether she has sustained permanent brain damage

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Richardson and Joe Lycett taking on Sean Lock and Michelle Wolf. Adam Riches joins resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a property in Yorkshire which is part Victorian stone farmhouse and part brick extension, with interiors that are outdated and in need of renovating. Meanwhile in Buckinghamshire, George meets the owners of an 18th century gatehouse who need help changing the layout of their living room

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Documentary set inside Wood Green animal charity. A two-year-old Pomeranian called Bear arrives at the centre, rescued from a life spent caged on a puppy farm. Can Bear learn to trust again and win the hearts of a family looking for a dog? Meanwhile, Knobby the Chihuahua puppy tries to charm his way into the affections and home of couple Alex and Kier

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty examines whether it is worth growing your own fruit and vegetables, or if the supermarket equivalent is always cheaper, and learns about Britain's current soil crisis. Helen Lawal exposes the lucrative trade of illegal trafficking of eels and Kate Quilton discovers what gives ginger beer its kick

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp introduces new crafts, skills and techniques for interior decoration. In this edition, she reveals how to create a personalised vintage doormat and coasters, using spray paint, old tiles and serviettes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Syd and Caroline Keenan from Cheshire want to buy a holiday home for their family but can't decide whether it should be in Wales's Llyn Peninsula, where Caroline has strong family connections, or Sesimbra in Portugal: a place Syd loves for its culture, cuisine and climate. Jonnie Irwin shows them fantastic properties in Wales, while Jasmine Harman has great homes in Portugal for Syd and Caroline's budget of £250,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien restores an enamel roll-top bath and builds a den out of old doors. Henry Cole makes a wall mounted safe from a jerry can and lovingly restores a cheese-making trough

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire and Worcestershire. Henry makes a table from the base of a broken agricultural grain mill, while Simon creates a garden seat from an old mangle

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Angel as they host a very special wedding for close friends. Motorcycle-mad Essex couple Martin and Kim start their search to buy the perfect chateau but can't see eye to eye. Cash-strapped Tim and Rebecca call in their mates to help with restoration work. Fiona puts her B&B plans on hold as she races against time to prepare for her first wedding. With the reception set to be outside she needs to fix 40 windows on the ageing chateau facade

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets a Suffolk family with a love of horses that plans to build an oak-framed cottage. However, their approach to managing a modest budget is more hit-and-hope than spreadsheet savvy. With couple Steve and Susan facing ruin, Charlie is forced into one of his famous pep talks to bring the project back in line and spring the family-of-four from their caravan exile

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the African-themed Foxholm B&B in North Yorkshire begins another competition, trying to prove their establishment offers the best value for money. Julie Janes and Yvonne Quinsey initially impress their guests with a cupcake class, but tempers fray when John Shields makes an unfavourable remark about German-born Sigrid

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wendy Johnson and John Shields welcome their rival hoteliers to the Pack Horse, an American diner-themed B&B in Lincolnshire, for the second round of the competition. A horse-riding session turns sour when Steve Reed takes a dislike to Nick Lawler, and matters get worse over dinner - before a pancake shortage at breakfast causes problems for the hosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Sigrid Reed host at their Glenwalden B&B in Blackpool. They hope ballroom dancing will entertain the guests, some of whom object to the pink flock wallpaper and knitted toilet roll holders. Nick Lawler seems to be warming to the owners, but one of them suspects his change of heart is all part of a cunning plan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick Lawler and business partner Kate Wilson host the competition at the Winder Hall Country House B&B in the Lake District, but a clash of egos ensues when they try to lecture the other participants about how to manage their hospitality establishments, and a disastrous breakfast service leaves contestants unimpressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secret life of the animals of Chester Zoo, one of Britain's most popular zoos, using new micro-rig technology to capture the behaviour of the animals and their close relationships with their keepers. Vets at Chester Zoo treat an elephant calf for the herpes virus, the same virus that resulted in the deaths of two calves the year before. A breeding phenomenon plays out among the extraordinary cardinal fish, and the zoo's humboldt penguins welcome 16 new members to their colony

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca battle to get their chateau looking tip top for a tour operator who may potentially want to put it on his books for visitors to the nearby Le Mans motor racing track. Motorcycle-loving couple Martin and Kim continue their roller coaster search for a dream chateau. The clock is ticking for Fiona as she has 24 hours to prepare for her first ever wedding, and ensure that her 12-acre grounds are picture perfect for the big day. Karen, Paul and their two children need to make their chateau attractive to guests. Their latest plan is to restore a disused hen house, but tensions rise when Paul doesn't meet Karen's standards

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Ash Brownrigg has skied all over the world and always dreamed of owning a log home like the ones he's seen in the snow of the Alps. He even tried building one himself in the past, but sold it many years ago. Now he's found the perfect spot at the base of Mount Ruapehu on the North Island, and is getting a new log home constructed by a company that uses traditional techniques

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud visits a house belonging to an engineer that resembles a giant snake. The building was inspired by an ammonite shell and has a scaly, curving structure that spirals over two levels and combines natural materials with the latest modern technology. However, completing the project within the 12-month schedule may not be possible for mechanical engineer Stephen Tetlow and wife Elizabeth

programme.title: Nordic Murders
programme.desc: After six years in prison, former district attorney Karin returns to her house on the island of Usedom, the place she impulsively shot her husband after finding him with a younger lover. The islanders keep their distance, and even Karin's daughter Julia, doesn't entirely trust her. However, Julia has bigger fish to fry as she investigates a car crash from several years ago in which two people died. Detective drama, starring Max Hopp, Rainer Sellien, Katrin Sass and Lisa Maria Potthoff. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Adam is brought in by ambulance after being involved in a high-speed motorcycle accident. The injured 20-year-old joined by his dad and sister. Meanwhile, Richard, aged 70, arrives at A&E with a high heart rate, and 10-year-old Pia is brought in by her mum after falling over and hurting her knee

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Leon, 36, is airlifted to St George's after being involved in a head-on collision with a car, while rugby player Graham, 37, is treated after clashing with another player, and has lost feeling in his arms and legs. Plus, four-year-old Elliott has come to A&E with his mum after getting a foreign object stuck up his nose

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: A Liverpool family face a difficult decision choosing which one of a litter of 10 German shepherd puppies to take home with them. The Wood Green staff also hope a Staffordshire bull terrier, brought in by social services after an incident in its previous home, will be able to find a more understanding owner, and a Yorkshire terrier with a big attitude tries to win over a couple

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Germany to learn the secret behind potato crisp, while Helen Lawal investigates whether carb-restrictive diets really burn fat quicker, and uncovers an eye-opening medical use for this popular weight-loss tool. Plus, Matt Tebbutt finds out the surprising reason why smoked fish is dyed yellow

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt reveals the sweet secret to iced writing on supermarket birthday cakes, and Jimmy Doherty jets to Japan to establish why soy is in so many of the UK's favourite foods, also learning how this little bean could be health-enhancing. Kate Quilton looks at the growing trend of hemp-based food products

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Julie Okine and Simon Sheriff, a pair of barristers in London, aim to fulfil a long-held dream of buying a holiday home in Spain, after Julie inherited some money from her mother. With a cash budget of £100,000 in mind, Laura Hamilton shows them five very different properties along the eastern Costa del Sol

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Leeds couple Neil Turner and Zoe Brown, who are planning to get married in Ibiza and whose wedding present to each other is to find a holiday home on the island

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Susan Peters from Dorchester, Dorset, has her heart set on moving to stunning Mallorca. Armed with a £130,000 budget and with best friend Tina to help her with the decision, Scarlette Douglas shows her five properties on the island

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is in Bournemouth with Mary Jane and Paul, single parents looking for the perfect home to bring their families together. However, a slow-moving market makes the search challenging with a first viewing that really does not go to plan. Phil Spencer is helping Alan and Nora, who have relocated to the seaside from Coventry with their four teenage children, and want to move on from their current rental property

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: More than a decade ago, Kevin McCloud visited Brighton to meet a co-operative of 10 families, including former travellers and single parents, who were building their own and each other's homes, with the promise that the council would allow them to live in the finished properties at a reduced rent. For two years they laboured, balancing a 30-hour week with various other commitments. Now the presenter returns to see whether the houses, and the community that built them, have stood the test of time

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Simran Samra hosts the first party in east London, and decides to cook meat for her main course, despite being a vegetarian. The fashionista tries to salvage her chances of winning the £1,000 prize by performing a range of comedy accents after fellow competitor Alan Price upsets one of the guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Comedian Yoshki Greenberg hosts the second dinner party in east London, but her decision to surprise the guests by asking them to wear animal-themed pyjama suits does not go down well - leaving her struggling to win them over with a stand-up routine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alan Price hosts the third party in east London, and sets out to impress his fellow competitors with a medieval-themed dinner. He hopes to raise the standard of the contest with an ambitious menu, but stumbles at the first hurdle when vegetarian diner Simran Samra panics at the sight of his authentic pig's head as the table centrepiece. Things do not improve as the night goes on, with dirty dinner plates and sloppy hosting leaving the guests less than impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bar owner Delia Elliot hosts the fourth dinner party from east London, and she is confident she can teach her young diners the protocol of entertaining guests. However, prankster Alan Price ends up having an argument with her, leading Simran Samra to take evasive action

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Doctor Chintu Gademsetty hosts the final dinner party in east London, and is confident of impressing his guests with a 1980s-themed evening. Even though his dance competition is not a hit with all of the diners, his food goes down a treat, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Tynemouth 61 in Tyne and Wear, where owner Stephen Minns taking his guests to an indoor climbing wall in his attempt to impress them

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Black Horse Inn in Kirkby Fleetham, North Yorkshire, where manager Steve Barker and bar manager Callum Dixon believe they can win their guests over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week the group head to The Shores Hotel in Blackpool, where guests Lottie and Lil are surprised by the view from their window

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lottie and Lil Ellis try to convince the contestants that glamping is glamorous at Hilltop Hideaways in Leamington Spa - only for one guest to reveal she will not be staying

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Tynemouth 61 is first and host Stephen Minns wants Enid and Nathanael to dish the dirt on their comments about cleanliness

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Mrs Doyle wins a competition to meet a famous singer, and discreetly invites him round for tea - but the secret slips out, and soon the house is besieged by hordes of adoring pensioners. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Pauline McLynn

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A smooth-talking priest offers Ted a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to leave Craggy Island and run his own parish in Beverly Hills, but first he has to tell Jack, Dougal and Mrs Doyle that they are not invited. Final episode of the clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, with Tommy Tiernan, Jeff Harding and a cameo appearance by music star Brian Eno

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Richard, who's 47, has fallen off a ladder while he was fixing his roof, and 87-year-old Doreen arrives in resus suffering from a serious infection. Elsewhere, doctors also treat five-year-old Cojo, who has come to paediatrics with his dad after injuring his elbow while he was wrestling with his brother

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Zach, who's 25, is rushed to A&E after completely severing four fingers in a building site accident. Staff and plastic surgeons assess the damage and stem the bloody wound. Cameras also follow former teacher Ricky, who's 85. She has hurt her back after falling at home, and 10-year-old Daquon was hit by a motorbike when he was on his way to school. He has memory loss and a badly broken arm

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Excitable French bulldog Buddy arrives at the centre. His owners have tried selling him seven times but every time he has been rejected. Can the staff finally find him a forever home? An eight-year-old girl who always wanted a small dog has her mind changed when she sees stray labrador Leah, and nervous collie Kimmie needs another dog to keep her company

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of the team's favourite investigations. Kate Quilton visits Haagen-Dazs to find out why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, while Helen Lawal heads to Tanzania to see the lengths vanilla farmers go to in the production of the natural flavouring. Matt Tebbutt travels to the Netherlands to explore the myth that Edam was once used as emergency cannon balls and Jimmy Doherty learns about an innovative solution to the problem of shellfish feeding on discarded plastic in the sea

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: The fortune-finding show continues in Bentwaters, with the contents of some old army bunkers exciting the bidders, while a vintage box captures Rupert's attention

programme.title: American Pickers
